title: Software Development Engineer I
description:
**About Joveo** 




 As the global leader in AI\\-powered, high\\-performance recruitment marketing, Joveo is transforming talent attraction and recruitment media buying for the world’s largest employers, staffing firms, RPOs, and media agencies. The Joveo platform enables businesses to attract, source, engage, and hire the best candidates on time and within budget.
 



 Backed by marquee investors like Nexus Ventures Partners, Joveo has been featured in Inc. Magazine’s List of America’s Fastest\\-Growing Private Companies for three years in a row.
 



 Powering millions of jobs every day, Joveo’s data\\-driven recruitment marketing platform uses advanced data science and machine learning to dynamically manage and optimize talent sourcing and applications across all online channels while providing real\\-time insights at every step of the job seeker journey, from click to hire.
 



 For more information about Joveo’s award\\-winning platform, visit
 
 www.joveo.com
 




  





**Responsibilities** 



* Work as part of a high\\-performing engineering team to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs.
* Contribute to the end\\-to\\-end development lifecycle, from requirement analysis to production deployment.
* Write clean, efficient, and testable code while following software engineering best practices.
* Participate in code reviews, debugging, and performance tuning to ensure high\\-quality deliverables.
* Collaborate with product managers, frontend engineers, and QA teams to deliver impactful features.
* Take ownership of assigned modules, ensuring stability, scalability, and maintainability.
* Continuously learn and adapt to new technologies and methodologies in a fast\\-paced startup environment.



  





**Requirements** 



* 1\\+ years of experience as a Development Engineer with Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, computer engineering, electrical engineering or equivalent work experience.
* Experience with at least one the following languages: Java, and/or any functional language.
* Experience with software engineering best practices and solid understanding of object\\-oriented programming, data structures, and algorithms.
* A blend of product, system, and people knowledge that lets you jump into fast\\-paced environment and contribute from day one.
* An ability to balance a sense of urgency with shipping high quality and pragmatic solutions.
* Extensive experience working with a large code base and cross\\-functional team.
* Self\\-motivation and enjoyment for a startup environment.

**About Job** 




  





**Role: Software Development Engineer I (Frontend)** 




  





 Joveo is looking for a passionate Software Development Engineer I (Frontend) to join our dynamic, expanding Engineering team in Hyderabad. Modern JavaScript and React are at the core of Joveo’s product development, and we leverage modern frontend tooling to build intuitive, high\\-performance user interfaces.
 



  





 As an SDE I, you will focus on writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code using modern React principles. You will collaborate closely with senior engineers, designers, and product teams to bring user\\-facing features to life. This role is a fantastic opportunity to accelerate your career, build a strong technical foundation, and help us push the boundaries of web applications.
 



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 0–2 years of experience in front\\-end development (this can include strong internships or a robust portfolio of personal projects).
* Modern React Focus: Solid foundation in React.js and component\\-driven architecture. You should be highly comfortable with functional components, state management, and modern React patterns.
* Modern Tooling: Familiarity with current frontend build tools and ecosystems (moving beyond legacy setups).
* Core Web Tech: Strong skills in HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6\\+), with the ability to build responsive UIs.
* Performance Mindset: A basic understanding of web delivery, browser rendering, and frontend optimization techniques.
* Team Player: Great communication skills, an eagerness to learn, and the ability to work collaboratively in a fast\\-paced environment.
* Problem Solver: Excellent analytical skills with a proactive approach to tackling technical challenges.
* Bonus Points: Contributions to open\\-source projects, an active GitHub profile, or deployed personal React applications.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description:
**About Joveo:** 




 Every company says they're "AI\\-first." We actually are. Joveo's recruitment
 



 advertising platform processes millions of hiring decisions through machine
 



 learning, real\\-time bidding, and predictive analytics — helping the world's
 



 largest employers find the right people, faster and fairer. But we're not
 



 done. Not even close.
 



  





**Role:** 
 Junior Software Engineer
 



**Location:** 
 Remote
 



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are hiring a Junior Software Engineer to contribute real code to
 



 Joveo's production platform while growing your skills alongside
 



 experienced engineers. You will own small features end\\-to\\-end,
 



 participate in team rituals, and build the engineering foundation
 



 that will carry your career for years.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 \\- Build, test, and ship features with increasing levels of autonomy
 



 \\- Fix bugs, resolve production issues, and contribute to technical debt work
 



 \\- Participate actively in code reviews, giving and receiving feedback
 



 \\- Learn and apply modern engineering practices — testing, CI/CD, observability
 



 \\- Collaborate with product and design on feature scoping and delivery
 



 \\- Develop deeper expertise in your team's primary tech stack
 



  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications:** 




 \\- 1–2 years of professional software engineering experience
 



 \\- Strong working knowledge of at least one production language (Python, Java, JavaScript, Go)
 



 \\- Experience shipping code in a team\\-based environment with version control
 



 \\- Familiarity with writing tests, reviewing code, and basic debugging practices
 



 \\- Understanding of databases, APIs, and web application fundamentals
 



 \\- Growth mindset with a willingness to take on stretch assignments
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 




 Joveo is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building an
 



 inclusive workplace and welcome applications from all qualified individuals
 



 regardless of race, color, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identity
 



 or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, marital status,
 



 or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. All hiring decisions
 



 are made solely on the basis of qualifications, skills, and demonstrated
 



 ability.
 



  





**If your dream job is one that doesn't fit neatly into a job title — apply.** 




**Joveo. Where AI meets the future of work.**

title: Software Development Engineer II (AI Engg)
description:
**About Joveo** 




 At Joveo, our mission is to deliver the right job to everyone in the world. We're the global leader in programmatic job advertising, building a new generation of recruitment technology. Our platform, backed by marquee investors like Nexus Venture Partners and celebrated on the Inc. 5000 list, is changing how employers find talent.
 



 Our secret sauce? We are building and deploying
 **state\\-of\\-the\\-art generative AI products, including intelligent multimodal chatbots, screening solutions and GenAI native applications that are seeing mass production adoption.** 
 To do this, we need exceptional engineers to build the robust, scalable, and resilient systems that bring AI to life.
 



  





**The Role: The Engineer Behind the AI** 




 This is an opportunity for a brilliant backend engineer to step into the world of AI. We're looking for a systems thinker with a passion for building rock\\-solid software and a deep curiosity to tackle new challenges. You will be the architect and builder of the services that power our most innovative AI features.
 



 Your core strength is your engineering prowess. Your mission will be to apply that strength to the unique and fascinating problems of production\\-grade AI. You won't be siloed; you will have complete ownership of your projects, from a blank editor to a running service in production.
 



  





**What You'll Do:** 



* **Build Production Systems:** 
 Architect, build, deploy, and operate highly scalable and available backend services that power our AI applications.
* **Full End\\-to\\-End Ownership:** 
 You build it, you run it. Take ownership of the entire development lifecycle, including design, implementation, testing, deployment (CI/CD), and monitoring. You won't be handing your code off to someone else to ship.
* **Solve Novel Problems:** 
 Apply your first\\-principles of engineering to the unique challenges of generative AI, such as managing state in conversational systems, optimizing for LLM latency, and ensuring data consistency.
* **Embrace Ambiguity:** 
 Thrive in a fast\\-paced environment where you are empowered to define the path forward, make key technical decisions, and turn ambiguous product ideas into concrete, shippable solutions.
* **Learn and Innovate:** 
 Dive headfirst into the modern AI stack. While you bring the engineering rigor, you'll have the opportunity to learn and work with LLMs, vector databases, evals and AI frameworks on the job.
* **Collaborate for Impact:** 
 Work in a tight\\-knit team with product managers (or without, if you prefer!) and other elite engineers to build solutions that directly impact our customers and our bottom line.



  





**What We're Looking For (The Ideal Candidate):** 




 You are a builder at heart. You find joy in creating elegant, efficient, and reliable systems and are excited by the prospect of learning a new domain.
 


* **Elite Backend Engineering:** 
 3\\+ years of experience building and operating complex, scalable, and high\\-performance backend systems. You have a strong grasp of distributed systems, API design, and software architecture.
* **Strong Programming Foundation:** 
 Deep proficiency in a systems language like
 **Python** 
 or
 **Java** 
 . You write clean, maintainable, and well\\-tested code. (Experience with Python is a strong plus).
* **A Fierce Curiosity \\& Rapid Learning Ability:** 
 This is non\\-negotiable.
 **Prior professional experience with LLMs is NOT required.** 
 What is mandatory is a demonstrated passion for learning, a history of quickly mastering new technologies, and a genuine excitement to become an expert in the AI/ML space.
* **The Ownership Mindset:** 
 You are a self\\-starter who is comfortable with ambiguity and enjoys the freedom and responsibility of a startup environment. You have extensive experience working in large codebases and are skilled at navigating cross\\-functional dependencies.
* **Pragmatic and Driven:** 
 You have a strong sense of urgency and an ability to deliver high\\-quality, pragmatic solutions quickly without sacrificing long\\-term stability.



  





**Why You’ll Love This Role at Joveo:** 



* **The Perfect Launchpad into AI:** 
 This is your chance to pivot into the most exciting field in technology. Leverage your elite engineering skills as a foundation and let us provide the problems, mentorship, and environment for you to become an expert in production AI.
* **Build Things That Matter:** 
 The systems you build will be the backbone of products used by millions, directly helping people find jobs.
* **Radical Ownership:** 
 Forget bureaucracy. You will have the autonomy to make critical decisions and see your work go live in production, fast.
* **A Culture of Builders:** 
 Join a world\\-class team of pragmatic and passionate engineers and entrepreneurs who are focused on solving real\\-world problems.

title: Developer - Shotscope™ (.NET Full Stack) - Husky (Guindy,Chennai)
description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Developer \\- Shotscope™ (.NET Full Stack) \\- Husky (Guindy,Chennai)
   

  

**Id:** 
 20909
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\\-of\\-the\\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 Do you want to work an industrial‑grade software solution powering real‑time manufacturing intelligence on factory floors worldwide?
   

  

 As a Developer on our Shotscope™ team, you will help build and maintain industrial\\-grade manufacturing intelligence software used by customers worldwide. You will implement features and components on a .NET and Azure\\-based full stack, contribute clean and reliable code, and support the continuous evolution of a mission\\-critical product that connects machines, processes, and data.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a motivated engineer who enjoys hands\\-on development, learning from experienced teammates, and seeing their work deployed in real production environments—with clear opportunities to grow toward senior and lead roles.
   

  

 If you want your code to have visible impact on how factories operate, Shotscope™ is where software meets the real world.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
**Technical Implementation**
* Implement software components and features based on provided designs, specifications, and guidance.
* Contribute to the development of reliable, maintainable, and secure code within the assigned scope.
* Apply agreed coding standards, patterns, and best practices in daily development work.
* Make basic technical decisions within assigned tasks, escalating questions or uncertainties when needed.


**Delivery \\& Execution Excellence**
* Translate assigned requirements and tasks into working software.
* Complete development work in alignment with sprint goals and delivery commitments.
* Contribute to task breakdowns and effort estimates for assigned work.
* Proactively raise risks, blockers, or implementation issues to the team.


**Quality, Standards \\& Engineering Practices**
* Write clean, testable code and contribute to unit and integration tests.
* Participate in code reviews, incorporating feedback and learning from peers.
* Ensure individual contributions meet Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) criteria.
* Follow established DevOps, security, and quality practices.


**Incident \\& Operational Support**
* Assist in troubleshooting defects and issues in development and production environments.
* Support corrective (bug fixes) and evolutive (enhancements) maintenance of existing solutions.


**Collaboration \\& Growth**
* Collaborate effectively with other developers, QA, Product Owners, and Tech Leads.
* Seeking feedback and guidance to continuously improve technical skills.
* Actively learn the systems, tools, and technologies used by the team.
* Contribute positively to team culture and shared ownership of outcomes.


****Qualifications****
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 4\\+ years’ professional experience in software development.
* Proficiency in .NET technologies (C\\#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, .NET Framework, Entity Framework).
* Strong grasp of Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, application security and version control systems (e.g., Azure DevOps).
* Proficiency in modern front\\-end frameworks (e.g., preference: React; Angular).
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test\\-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.


**Assets**
* Familiarity with CI/CD and pipelines.
* Experience using AI‑assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, with experience in leveraging key services (e.g., Azure App Services, Azure Functions).
* Exposure to Microsoft SQL Server BI stack, including SSAS (OLAP cube design), SSRS (report development), and SSIS (ETL processes and data integration).


**Why Husky?**

title: Software Development Senior Engineer - Waters Material Sciences
description:
**Overview**
 We're looking for a passionate
 **Senior Software Engineer** 
 with a talent for building quality software solutions. You will work in a fast\\-paced, agile environment and engage in technical discussions, participate in technical designs, demonstrate problem\\-solving abilities, and present and share ideas through global collaboration.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a Senior Software Engineer, you will:
   

  

* Develop features and new instrumentation support on our C\\# Windows desktop application for instrument control and data visualization
* Research, design, develop, and release/maintain: Application, User interface, Data analysis, Instrument control software for thermal analysis, rheological, and calorimetric instruments.
* Evaluate system specifications and translate system requirements to task specifications.
* Responsible for ongoing support of current programs, including performance, diagnosis, and troubleshooting of problem programs, and designing solutions to problematic programming.
* Working within a formal development process covering the full development lifecycle.
* Use code design abilities (including working to SOLID principles and some knowledge of engineering for performance) to generate and document appropriate designs.
* Work in collaboration with the agile team and appropriate experts to implement your designs.
* Provide code and supporting documentation in accordance with the coding guidelines, quality processes, and applicable procedures, including the team's definition of DONE.
* Work in collaboration with the agile team to generate automated and manual tests to verify the implemented software.
* Provide work estimation and tracking information to support management decisions and planning.
* Keep a proactive attitude to ensure continuous improvement of the software quality, work process, and individual skills.
* Provide contributions to the application architecture with a focus on scalability, maintainability, security and performance.
* Provide product specific and technical support to internal and external users where appropriate.


 As a Team Member, you will:
   

  

* Participate in all team meetings and ceremonies in direct collaboration with other sites, provide input and feedback, take ownership on identified improvements.
* Actively participate in learning and sharing activities either during informal or formal training and demos.
* Demonstrate continuous technical improvement.


**Qualifications**
**Education:**
* Bachelor’s Degree in computer science or computer engineering preferred, or equivalent combination of education, training, and experience


**Experience:**
* 7\\+ years of experience developing Windows desktop applications
* You have C\\# and/or other .NET programming experience and basic experience in applying technical standards.
* Windows Desktop experience (WinForms, WPF, XAML, .net Framework)
* Experience working in heavily multi\\-threaded environments.
* Familiarity with Java programming languages to support the development of touchscreen applications.
* You are using your communication, teamwork, analysis, and decision\\-making skills, and you are familiar with Agile methodologies.
* You will be working closely with the management team in evaluating current systems and making design decisions on future development.
* As new technologies emerge and impact our systems, you will learn these technologies very quickly and resolve any problems involved in integrating technologies with our systems.
* You care about software; you have a passion for what you do, which you can clearly convey by your actions and experiences. You have an eye for software design and can talk eloquently on a range of topics due to your experiences and also from reading and experimentation.


**Preferred:**
* Experience working in an analytical instrumentation domain
* Networking and TCPI/IP communication
* Interfacing with embedded devices


**Company Description**
 Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) is a global leader in life sciences and diagnostics, dedicated to accelerating the benefits of pioneering science through analytical technologies, informatics, and service. With a focus on regulated, high\\-volume testing environments, our innovative portfolio harnesses deep scientific expertise across chemistry, physics, and biology. We collaborate with customers around the world to advance the release of effective, high\\-quality medicines, ensure the safety of food and water, and drive better patient outcomes by detecting diseases earlier, managing routine infections, and combating antibiotic resistance. Through a shared culture of relentless innovation, our passionate team of :16,000 colleagues turn scientific challenges into breakthroughs that improve lives worldwide.
